user_input: use logo files in design files folder

content:
I've updated both the `meta-ads-smm-s2.html` and `meta-ads-studio-dark.html` files in your project folder to correctly render the logo. 

**What changed:**
Instead of using a CSS `mask` (which can sometimes fail to render local files in certain browser environments, appearing "broken" or invisible), I've wired both templates to directly display `mpm0xnib-logo-light-trim.png` as a standard background image. 

The logo will now perfectly scale and appear across both the Feed and Story preview canvases. You can view the live changes right in your preview pane.
